ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or individual behind the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Short description or tagline of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_image" TEXT /* URL of the project's main image */,
  "project_video" TEXT /* URL of the project's promotional video */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers who pledged to the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project's funding goal */,
  "project_location" TEXT /* Location where the project will be implemented or is based */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., charity, equity, lending) */,
  "launched_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project was launched */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the project's funding period ends */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is in the spotlight section */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project backed by the backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the backer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the pledge */,
  "backer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "backer_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update is for */,
  "update_title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "update_content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "update_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the update was posted */,
  "update_image" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the update */,
  "update_video" TEXT /* URL of a video associated with the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project offering the reward */,
  "reward_title" TEXT /* Title of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Pledge amount required to receive the reward */,
  "reward_image" TEXT /* URL of an image showcasing the reward */,
  "reward_shipping_details" TEXT /* Details about the shipping process, including estimated delivery time and costs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the transaction */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward (if applicable) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  "transaction_fee" INTEGER /* Fee associated with the transaction, including payment processing fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers */,
  "pledged_amount" INTEGER /* Total pledged amount */,
  "update_count" INTEGER /* Number of updates */,
  "average_pledge" REAL /* Average pledge amount */,
  "project_rating" REAL /* Project rating (based on backer reviews and feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
